title: Don't Get So Grabby, You Clumsy Oaf!
overview: Some love stories begin after a single, fated encounter on the way to school. Asahi is lucky (or unlucky) enough to have five of them.

title: I Figure We All Have Our Own Pleasures and Predilections
overview: Asahi’s weird day gets even weirder when he suddenly finds himself the target of multiple romantic advances! It’s official: he has absolutely no idea what’s going on.

title: No! Not There! Not Like That!
overview: Amelia is an exchange student with a problem: she can’t write the native language.

title: Wow! It's Huge!
overview: Ilya has a secret Asahi cannot find out about, but how long will it take for the truth to come out? In the end, Ilya has an important decision to make.

title: A Bone-Shakingly Fine Woman
overview: Bai Mongfa is a beloved teacher, but she has a past that’s about to catch up with her.

title: No Balls! N-No Dick Either...
overview: A strange flying object attacks Asahi, but he’s saved just in time by a magical girl! Unfortunately, this incident is the prelude of a horrible invasion...

title: I'll Charge a Snooze Fee
overview: Although Asahi and the others enjoy the summer seaside to their hearts’ content, something is wrong; so very wrong…

title: People Don't Like It If You're Early, But They Hate It If You're Late Too
overview: Everything’s different when Asahi wakes up the next morning. Regardless of how he feels, it’s time to face reality.

title: Your Mom's Inviting You for Some Baby Roleplay
overview: Asahi must decide what happens next.

title: Yup, It's Risky to Go in Raw, Rubber
overview: Asahi reunites with the others, but they can’t celebrate just yet; a struggle beyond anything they’ve imagined awaits.

title: I'm Glad I Got to Meet You
overview: Time is in short supply to those who need it the most.

title: Could You At Least Put Some Undies On?
overview: The price was high, but Asahi has finally reached Aoi. Now, the only thing left is for her to lead him to Ai.
